MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-09-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MARCUS MATTHEW'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION. GRANTED. DEFENDANT LIVE NATION WORLDWIDE, INC. MUST PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $2,800 TO PLAINTIFF MARCUS MATTHEW NO LATER THAN JUNE 19, 2025. LIVE NATION'S ARGUMENT THAT ITS NON-OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION INSULATES IT FROM MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTRARY TO CALIFORNIA LAW. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARCUS MATTHEW's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production.

Granted. Defendant Live Nation Worldwide, Inc. must pay monetary sanctions of $2,800 to plaintiff Marcus Matthew no later than June 19, 2025. Live Nation's argument that its non-opposition to this motion insulates it from monetary sanctions is contrary to California law.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Continued To Apr-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
